# Support

Thank you for using this project! Here are a few ways to get help:

## Documentation

Please start by reading the [README](README.md) for an overview of the project and its usage.

## Reporting Issues

If you encounter a bug or unexpected behavior, please [open an issue](../../issues/new/choose) and provide as much detail as possible, including steps to reproduce the problem.

## Feature Requests

Have an idea? We'd love to hear it. [Open a feature request](../../issues/new/choose) to start a discussion.

## Security Issues

For security-related issues, please refer to our [Security Policy](SECURITY.md) and **do not** open a public issue.

## Community

Please be kind and respectful in all interactions. See our [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) for details.
